# Muhammad, I need your help to improve WPBeginner ❤️

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-01-04 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 449

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

I need your help!

This year, WPBeginner is turning 16 years old, and I am
determined to make it the best it can be…

But for that, I’ll need your quick favor.

I want to better understand your business needs, so we can
produce content that serves your needs.

I really hope you’ll let me borrow a few minutes of your time to
give me some feedback.

👉 Please Complete This Short Survey 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.YXOlRGbvxLBtxw0Nf9nZsMZHfSqW4EyW1rmajmE5LD4 ) 👈

It will take less than 3 minutes, I promise.

All answers are kept private, and your response will be a primary
factor in shaping the future of WPBeginner, what content gets
published, and what tools / features we add.

2025 is going to be awesome, and I can’t wait to share all the
new stuff that we’re working on.

Thank you once again for your continued support. I truly
appreciate you!

Have a great rest of your week :)

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner

P.S. 2024 was the most emotionally challenging year of my life
despite all the amazing accomplishments on the business side.
Here’s what happened to me in 2024 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.C7b1_zFMVenpCiazZWF1n7beYMA_8-wUUdOBAyKdAQ4 )
 (from my personal blog)!

P.P.S. Also, we’ve published a roundup that looks back at some of
the best tutorials 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.2QqDiYosV5aC4_CZuSyceS3Fl-YablGixjsLmBnYSA4 )
 we published on WPBeginner in 2024. I hope you’ll enjoy it.
